text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to think and learn like humans. At its core, AI involves creating computer programs that can solve problems, make decisions, and even understand language. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance by analysing large amounts of data instead of being explicitly programmed. Deep learning takes this further by using complex neural networks, similar to the human brain, to process information. You already interact with AI in daily life—for example, when your phone suggests the next word in a text, when streaming services recommend movies you might like, or when you ask a voice assistant for the weather.
